name: seccloud
description: This repo contains a synthetic-first PoC for a BYOC insider-risk substrate and thin investigation workflow.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:py && npm run lint:web && npm run lint:rust && npm run typecheck && npm run format:check
scripts.lint:fix: uv run ruff check --fix src tests scripts && uv run ruff format src tests scripts && eslint web/src --fix && npm run format
scripts.lint:py: uv run ruff check src tests scripts && uv run ruff format --check src tests scripts
scripts.generate:api-types: uv run seccloud export-openapi-spec --output web/openapi.json && openapi-typescript web/openapi.json -o web/src/api.generated.ts
scripts.format: uv run ruff format src tests scripts && prettier --write "web/**/*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx,css,html}" eslint.config.js .pre-commit-config.yaml "*.{json,md}"
scripts.app:push-gateway: cd rust && RUST_LOG=info SECCLOUD_WORKSPACE=../.seccloud SECCLOUD_PUSH_AUTH_TOKENS='{"dev-token":{"tenant_id":"local","source":"okta","integration_id":"okta-primary"}}' cargo run --bin seccloud-gateway
scripts.demo:load-example-batch:okta: cd rust && RUST_LOG=info SECCLOUD_WORKSPACE=../.seccloud SECCLOUD_COLLECTOR_SOURCE=okta SECCLOUD_FIXTURE_DIR=../examples/poc/vendor-fixtures/fixed-source-pack SECCLOUD_COLLECTOR_MODE=once cargo run --bin seccloud-collector
scripts.demo:load-example-batch:github: cd rust && RUST_LOG=info SECCLOUD_WORKSPACE=../.seccloud SECCLOUD_COLLECTOR_SOURCE=github SECCLOUD_FIXTURE_DIR=../examples/poc/vendor-fixtures/fixed-source-pack SECCLOUD_COLLECTOR_MODE=once cargo run --bin seccloud-collector
scripts.demo:load-example-batch:gworkspace: cd rust && RUST_LOG=info SECCLOUD_WORKSPACE=../.seccloud SECCLOUD_COLLECTOR_SOURCE=gworkspace SECCLOUD_FIXTURE_DIR=../examples/poc/vendor-fixtures/fixed-source-pack SECCLOUD_COLLECTOR_MODE=once cargo run --bin seccloud-collector
scripts.demo:load-example-batch:snowflake: cd rust && RUST_LOG=info SECCLOUD_WORKSPACE=../.seccloud SECCLOUD_COLLECTOR_SOURCE=snowflake SECCLOUD_FIXTURE_DIR=../examples/poc/vendor-fixtures/fixed-source-pack SECCLOUD_COLLECTOR_MODE=once cargo run --bin seccloud-collector
scripts.demo:queue-example-batch: npm run demo:load-example-batch:okta && npm run demo:load-example-batch:github && npm run demo:load-example-batch:gworkspace && npm run demo:load-example-batch:snowflake
scripts.demo:load-example-batch: npm run demo:queue-example-batch && uv run seccloud wait-for-pipeline-idle --workspace .seccloud --report-interval-seconds 10
scripts.demo:generate-data: uv run seccloud run-demo-stream --workspace .seccloud --batch-size 500 --interval-seconds 0 --steps 80 && uv run seccloud wait-for-pipeline-idle --workspace .seccloud --report-interval-seconds 10
scripts.demo:load-example-batch:once: npm run demo:queue-example-batch && npm run demo:process:once
